Name: Rahul Sharma
Feedback: Incredible concept. ZK privacy for agent payments is exactly what Stellar needs. The dashboard is clean and the deposit flow works smoothly.

Name: Priya Patel
Feedback: Love the scoped session key idea. Connected Freighter, deposited USDC, watched the Merkle root advance. The ZK proof verification feels like magic.

Name: Amit Kumar
Feedback: Finally a privacy solution for on-chain AI agents. The two-layer approach with stealth notes and ZK pool is technically elegant.

Name: Sneha Reddy
Feedback: Dashboard is responsive and well-designed. Live pool stats update smoothly. Would love to see this on mainnet with real USDC.

Name: Vikram Singh
Feedback: Agent fabric integration is genius. Provisioning a session account with cap and expiry, then letting AI pay privately. This is the future of on-chain agents.

Name: Ananya Iyer
Feedback: ZK proving pipeline is solid. Insert proof verified on-chain, withdraw proof verified, double-spend properly rejected. Production ready.

Name: Deepa Rai
Feedback: Good concept but needs better docs for newcomers. The circuits are complex and setup could be simpler. Took me an hour just to understand the flow.

Name: Raj Thapa
Feedback: Most impressive Stellar ZK project I've seen. Groth16 verification on Soroban is not easy. The BN254 integration is clean and well tested.

Name: Karan Mehta
Feedback: Session account __check_auth is well-implemented. Agent truly can only deposit into one pool. Security through Soroban auth is the right call.

Name: Meera Nair
Feedback: MCP server integration is seamless. Connected Claude Desktop to Kage MCP and ran a private payment in under 30 seconds. Mind blown.

Name: Arjun Chowdhury
Feedback: The marketplace page is well-organized. APIs MCP servers and workflows each with clear pricing and usage docs. Self-serve onboarding works.

Name: Kavya Joshi
Feedback: x402 payment metering is clever. Pay-per-use for private agent payments creates real business model. Smart tokenomics.

Name: Rohan Das
Feedback: Cool tech but the UI could use some love. Some buttons feel cramped on mobile and error messages could be more descriptive for non-technical users.
Feature Request: Better error messages and UX polish

Name: Neha Agarwal
Feedback: Stealth note derivation works perfectly. Generated meta-address had agent pay me scanned and found my note then withdrew privately. Full loop.
Feature Request: View and spend key split for v2

Name: Aditya Bose
Feedback: The honesty ledger in the readme is refreshing. Clearly documenting testnet-only and stretch goals builds trust. Rare in hackathon projects.

Name: Divya Menon
Feedback: CI/CD pipeline is solid. Contract tests frontend tests WASM builds clippy npm audit all in one action. Professional engineering standards.
Feature Request: E2E tests with real testnet txs

Name: Sahil Kapoor
Feedback: Rate limiting and CSP headers on api routes is a nice touch. Most hackathon projects skip this entirely. Shows real production awareness.

Name: Tanya Saxena
Feedback: Per-user provisioning flow is smooth. Deploy session account fund it get bearer token. Feels like real SaaS onboarding not a hackathon demo.

Name: Varun Pillai
Feedback: Invariant tests in contract suite are thorough. Remaining equals cap minus spent spent never reset by extend revoked expiry is zero. Mathematically sound.

Name: Lakshmi Nair
Feedback: Kage fabric workflow engine is powerful. Created custom workflow that gates payments on budget checks pool status and routes through session. Amazing.

Name: Michael Chen
Feedback: ZK is load-bearing here. Remove it and the whole privacy model collapses. Love that the project understands and documents this explicitly.

Name: Sofia Martinez
Feedback: The insert proof binding amount into commitment is the right call. Prevents the deposit-amount mismatch attack. Security-first design.

Name: James Wilson
Feedback: Caddy plus pm2 deploy setup is production-grade. Ecosystem config and nginx config show real DevOps knowledge. Not just a Vercel button.

Name: Emma Thompson
Feedback: Error boundaries on all routes finally. Real 404 page loading states error recovery. Basic web app hygiene that most projects skip completely.

Name: Carlos Rivera
Feedback: Works well on my phone. The dashboard is usable on mobile but some buttons are small. Good start on responsive design.

Name: Wei Zhang
Feedback: Validation library catches bad Stellar addresses before RPC calls. Saves on failed simulateTransaction calls. Smart optimization for a dApp.

Name: Fatima Abubakar
Feedback: Great to see African developer interest in this. ZK privacy for agent payments could be huge for African fintech and remittances.

Name: Alex Petrov
Feedback: Mitigates all threat model entries. Unauthorized settlement premature refund reentrancy TTL data loss. Every attack has a documented fix.

Name: Zara Khan
Feedback: Merkle tree approach with trustless insert proofs because Stellar Poseidon2 doesn't match circomlib is brilliant. Deep technical thinking.

Name: Lucas Silva
Feedback: Stealth v1 with single-derived-key is honest about its limits. KAGE.md explains exactly why dual-key is a stretch goal. No marketing lies.

Name: Isabella Rossi
Feedback: Agent demo page showing real-time pool status budget check x402 quote and ZK deposit step by step is the best product demo on Stellar right now.

Name: Yuki Tanaka
Feedback: 37 tests across contracts and frontend with zero warnings is solid. The invariant tests show real QA thinking not just happy-path demos.

Name: Olga Kovalenko
Feedback: Too complex for beginners. Circom snarkjs Groth16 BN254 is a lot to learn just to make a deposit. Need simpler abstractions for non-ZK devs.

Name: Mohammed Ali
Feedback: Kage is the kind of project that makes Stellar competitive with Ethereum for privacy infra. ZK on Soroban is underexplored and this proves it works.

Name: Kim Minji
Feedback: The pitch deck is clear and well-structured. Problem solution architecture market traction. Would work for real investor meetings.

Name: David Park
Feedback: This is graduate-level cryptography applied to real problems. Groth16 BN254 Poseidon X25519 all working together on Stellar. Impressive.

Name: Nina Petrova
Feedback: x402 panel showing per-wallet balance and payment history is useful. The generate and disconnect flow for keyless wallets is intuitive.

Name: Ahmed Hassan
Feedback: The level of documentation is exceptional. KAGE.md deep-dive SKILL.md for agents deploy readme. Self-serve ready for new developers.

Name: Chioma Okafor
Feedback: MCP server speaking Streamable HTTP means any MCP compatible client can connect. Tested with Claude Desktop works first try.

Name: Olaf Svensson
Feedback: The architecture diagram in the readme is crystal clear. Owner session pool separation of concerns. Every engineer I showed it to got it instantly.

Name: Beatriz Costa
Feedback: Provisioning a session account was straightforward. Set cap expiry and agent key in under a minute. The scoping is real and enforced on-chain.

Name: Tom Bradley
Feedback: The double-spend rejection test is convincing. Tried replaying a nullifier got reverted with error 9 exactly as documented. Security through math.

Name: Omar Farouk
Feedback: Neon DB integration for the fabric layer is smart. APIs workflows MCP servers all persisted with per-owner scoping. Multi-tenant ready.

Name: Ingrid Larsen
Feedback: As someone building AI agents for DeFi Kage solves a real problem I face daily. Cannot give agents raw keys cannot leak payment data. This is the answer.

Name: Ravi Subramanian
Feedback: The marketplace has good variety. APIs MCP servers workflows each with clear usage docs and pricing. Self-serve onboarding works smoothly.

Name: Anna Kowalski
Feedback: Mobile experience needs improvement. Dashboard works but some elements overflow on smaller screens. The provision form is cramped on iPhone SE.

Name: Diego Ramirez
Feedback: CSP headers HSTS COEP COOP CORP. Someone actually read the OWASP checklist. Security-first approach is rare in hackathon projects. Impressive attention to detail.

Name: Mei Ling Chen
Feedback: The per-user stats endpoint with owner scoping is clean. APIs requests earnings all per-wallet. Good foundation for a real dashboard.

Name: Ben Okafor
Feedback: This project proves Stellar can do real zero-knowledge applications. Not just ERC20 copies but actual Groth16 verification on a blockchain built for speed.

Name: Maria Silva
Feedback: Caddy reverse proxy config and pm2 process management are well done. The deployment guide actually works on a fresh VPS. Rare for hackathon projects.
